notes:
Works perfectly after these two steps: 
1)Paste xlive.dll into the game folder
2)Paste d3d9.dll into the game folder and use winetricks as suggested here: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=36226
title: Fallout 3

notes: I will have to give this a "Platinum" rating! Runs out of the box once you have added the "xlive.DLL" to the root folder and added those pesky INI fixes, but I do think you have to do the INI tweaks in Windows too so all in all it's not so bad.
title: Fallout 3

notes: Works fine after copying xlive.dll from $HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/22300/pfx/drive_c/windows/syswow64/xlive.dll to $HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Fallout 3.

notes: Game worked fine when you copy xlive.dll, with occasional crashes here and there. Made for a decent playing experience, though stutters get pretty annoying quickly.
title: Fallout 3

notes: The game runs fine but there is one issue I can't seem to get around: Galaxy News Radio, due to using MP3s instead of WAVs or OGGs, does not work. Fallout 3 on my system along with several Windows systems has issues with the codecs that Fallout 3 uses to play MP3s.
title: Fallout 3

notes: Beside the missing xlive.dll it runs perfect. I have no issue's with this game. Posted a steamcommunity video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YXcT-mXMeno
title: Fallout 3

notes: Runs perfectly adding this line: PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%
title: Fallout 3

notes:
A simple guide to getting Fallout 3 to work on Linux using Steam Proton. 

Step 1 – Install Fallout 3 using Steam Proton 4.11-3

Step 2 – Download Xlive.dll

Best place is from NexusMods 

https://www.nexusmods.com/fallout3/mods/22591?tab=files

For standard Fallout 3 copy it to: 

Home / .steam / steam / steamapps / compatdata / 22300 / pfx / drive_c / windows / syswow64

For Fallout 3 – Game of the Year Edition copy it to: 

Home / .steam / steam / steamapps / compatdata / 22370 / pfx / drive_c / windows / syswow64

Step 3 – Fix the problem with mouse and random crashes.

Add / edit the following entries in Fallout.ini – You will need to launch Fallout 3 at least once to generate this file.

For standard Fallout 3 this is found at:

Home / .steam / steam / steamapps / compatdata / 22300 / pfx / drive_c / users / steamuser / My Documents / My Games / Fallout3

For Fallout 3 – Game of the Year Edition this is found at:

Home / .steam / steam / steamapps / compatdata / 22370 / pfx / drive_c / users / steamuser / My Documents / My Games / Fallout3

[General] 
bUseThreadedAI=1
iNumHWThreads=2

[Controls]
fForegroundMouseAccelBase=0
fForegroundMouseAccelTop=0
fForegroundMouseBase=0
fForegroundMouseMult=0

Step 4 – Disable Anti-aliasing and HDR / Bloom

Once done launch the game and have fun playing Fallout 3.

See https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GFCbv7eEF6U for a visual tutorial.
title: Fallout 3
